summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for 10 listed PRs. No shared canonical was assigned. One security-sensitive PR is routed to central security handling; three already-closed PRs are kept closed; the remaining open PRs are kept related or independent for maintainer review without close, merge, or fix actions.
